uows.rationale: Precondition verification must run first to avoid editing the wrong repository or missing types/files

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Exclusive precondition checks to unblock all downstream work

uows.rationale: Implement helper once TestModel import path is known; small, low-risk implementation foundational for component wiring

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Helper implementation depends on T1 and is required by component wiring

uows.rationale: Component wiring uses the helper and affects templates/CSS; schedule early to reveal build/type issues

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Sequential: template/CSS changes may affect harness and tests

uows.rationale: Add locators and harness methods after the template and data binding exist

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Harness changes depend on component template and selectors being present

uows.rationale: Cypress component tests are complex and should run after harnesses are available; they surface integration and flakiness risks

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Test suite must run after harness and component wiring to validate behavior

uows.rationale: Build verification and cleanup once changes and tests are merged/passing

execution_schedule.batch_rationale: Final verification depends on successful tests and builds

risk_ordered_items.risk_reason: Complex Cypress component tests (flakiness, long runtime)
Template and CSS scoping changes can break build and harness selectors
Type import and helper signature correctness (TestModel location unknown until T1)

metacognitive_context.decision_rationale: Tasks are mostly strictly dependent (T1->T2->T3->T4->T5->T6). Conservative serial scheduling minimizes merge conflicts and respects prevention rules from the Reference Librarian (precondition checks, avoid shared-libs/config parallel edits, quarantine test flakiness).

alternatives_discarded.approach: Aggressive parallelization by batching T2 and T3 together
alternatives_discarded.reason_rejected: T3 depends on T2 (helper) and CSS/template changes could invalidate harness work leading to rework and merge conflicts

alternatives_discarded.approach: Run Cypress tests (T5) in parallel with harness edits (T4)
alternatives_discarded.reason_rejected: Harness selectors must exist and be stable; running tests before harness solidification increases flakiness and false failures

knowledge_gaps: Exact TestModel TypeScript definition and import path (T1 must resolve)
Target repo project graph and CI configuration (nx.json, package.json, .github workflows) to confirm no hidden shared-lib touches
Any repo-specific CSS scoping conventions impacting class selectors

tool_anomalies.anomaly: Confidence 6; suggested files to inspect but did not read repo-level configs
